## Discord (mobile companion to Hermes desktop)

hey everyone 👋 i built a native iOS app for Hermes — a **mobile companion to
Hermes desktop**. it talks **only** to your own self-hosted `hermes-agent` gateway.
no third-party servers, nothing in between.

what it does:
• live multi-client streaming — desktop ↔ phone mirror the same sessions
• approvals & clarifications inline and from the lock screen
• push notifications + Live Activities / Dynamic Island
• home-screen widgets, file browse + attachment upload, voice dictation, Face ID lock

it's **open-source (MIT)**. setup is a self-contained gateway plugin — there's a
guide and even a copy-paste prompt you can hand your agent to install it for you.

**TestFlight (public):** https://testflight.apple.com/join/TeMvfFaS
**Repo / setup:** https://github.com/ab0991-oss/hermes-ios

it's early and built solo — i'd genuinely love **testers, feedback, and
contributors** (PRs welcome). would mean a lot to have your help taking it
further 🙏

(quick demo 👇)

## Notes
- Honest-push reminder (don't need to caveat in the post; README/KNOWN-ISSUES cover
  it): on the TestFlight build, background push from a self-hosted gateway is limited
  by Apple's signing model; full background push works when you build it yourself
  with your own Apple team key. Live chat / sync / in-app approvals / on-device Live
  Activity all work on the TestFlight build.
- NOT tagging mods to ask "make it stock" — earn it via traction + the upstream PRs;
  raise adoption softly/privately later from a position of strength.
